closer_should_know: This is a soft callback with no locked time — the only thread keeping it alive is the AEP bill email Tom agreed to send. When following up: (1) confirm the bill arrived and use that as the anchor to lock a specific date/time; (2) include Tom's wife in the scheduling conversation — she is on the title and was never included; (3) address the HOA/regulatory concern directly at the top of the appointment — Tom's opening hedge was 'it's probably a stretch' and that doubt was never resolved; (4) Tom has no prior designs and no competing quotes — clean competitive field, do not default to a comparison frame.
